component.name: KaTrain
component.summary: Go/Baduk/Weiqi playing and teaching app with AI analysis

description.p: KaTrain is a tool for analyzing and playing Go/Baduk/Weiqi with the KataGo AI engine. It offers AI opponents at various strength levels, teaching features that highlight mistakes, game review tools, and full-strength analysis.
Features include multiple AI playing styles, rank-calibrated opponents, real-time analysis with score graphs, SGF file support, and a modern graphical interface.
